backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing e-commerce backend with authorization, blob storage, user profiles, product management, cart operations, and order processing with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including product catalog, product detail, shopping cart, checkout flow, order history, and inventory management with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including React components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration files for the e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode color tokens for the application theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes, layout wrapper including header/footer, theme provider, and profile setup modal for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item card component displaying product image, name, quantity, price, subtotal, and remove button with mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Dropdown select component for filtering products by category with 'All Categories' option.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with branding, quick links navigation, social media icons, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header component with authentication controls, cart icon with item count badge, and responsive mobile menu using Sheet component. Handles login/logout via Internet Identity and navigation to products, orders, and inventory pages.
frontend/src/components/OrderCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for an order with order ID, status badge, item count, and total amount. Links to the detailed order page when clicked.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusBadge: Renders a colored badge component for order status (pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled) with appropriate styling for each state.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying product image, name, category badge, description, price, and stock indicator. Links to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductImage.tsx: Reusable image component for product photos with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and lazy loading support.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces users to complete their profile (name, email, phone) before using the app. Cannot be dismissed until profile is saved.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: Quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and direct number input, enforcing min/max constraints.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with debounced search callback (300ms delay) and search icon decoration.
frontend/src/components/ShippingForm.tsx: Simple form component with a textarea for entering shipping address information.
frontend/src/components/StockIndicator.t: Badge component showing stock status (Out of Stock, Low Stock, In Stock) with color-coded styling based on inventory levels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors. Initializes access control with admin token and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation. Provides authentication status and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profiles, products, cart operations, and orders, integrating with the backend actor and providing toast notifications for mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using HSL values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays shopping cart items with product details, calculates total amount, and provides checkout navigation; requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Handles checkout flow with shipping form, order summary, and checkout submission; validates authentication and non-empty cart before proceeding.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, feature highlights (inventory management, ordering, business growth), and call-to-action buttons linking to products and inventory.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryDashboardPag: Displays inventory dashboard with tabs for all products and low-stock items, showing product cards with stock indicators; requires authentication.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays order confirmation after successful checkout, showing order ID, total amount, shipping address, and item count with navigation to order history or product catalog.
frontend/src/pages/OrderDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed view of a single order including itemized product list with prices, quantities, subtotals, shipping address, and order status badge.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Lists all orders for authenticated users, prompting login if not authenticated and showing empty state if no orders exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalogPage.ts: Main product browsing page with search functionality, category filtering, and grid display of all products with loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Displays individual product details including image, price, description, stock availability, and quantity selector with add-to-cart functionality requiring authentication.
frontend/src/utils/imageHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions to get product image URLs with category-based fallback images when direct URLs are unavailable.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH, container settings, extended theme properties, animations, and plugin integrations for typography and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for a mobile-first e-commerce reseller application tracking features, requirements, and image assets. Defines implemented features including product catalog, shopping cart, checkout flow, order history, search/filtering, and user authentication.
